sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89818" key="proso/malos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσόμᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n89818.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tolerably level</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0097.tlg001:1:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diogenian.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
